arms.A1: unverified declarations: referee reads declarations and softens C_full_artifacts without checking conformance
arms.A2: verified declarations: softening only when declared && conforms; mismatch fail-closed containment

artifact_channel_registry.recorded_observable: declared_mass_by_step is recorded for every non-off arm as adoption dynamics; it is not a hypothesis threshold.

referee_side_verification_and_policy.audit_only_field_rule: No catastrophe or audit-only fields may be referenced in policy or verification code. Lower false containment is a hypothesis, not a branch condition.
referee_side_verification_and_policy.description: Conformance and C_full_artifacts policy read only existing Obs fields plus declarations; they are included in the same leakage scan as earlier gates.

world_side_emission.description: Declaration emission is agent/world behavior, analogous to extraction or migration; it may read strategy fields and is not part of the referee leakage scan.
world_side_emission.initial_conditions: declaration_propensity starts at 0.0 in every strategy template; adoption must arise by mutation/selection, not initialization.

metadata.mode: prospective; outcome citable under any result

outcome_branches.FAIL: At least one required hypothesis fails under its preregistered threshold; publish the failure vector as-is.
outcome_branches.PASS: H-C1, H-C2, and H-C3 pass; artifact verification extends the domain and the knife is load-bearing under the preregistered interpretation.
outcome_branches.VACUOUS_H_C2: If neither A1 nor A2 shows any pressure-ceiling gain over A0 in any world, H-C2 is reported VACUOUS rather than PASS: the load-bearing role of verification received no data.

metadata.pressure_ceiling_definition: For each world/arm, ceiling is the highest adversarial_pressure grid point whose aggregated cell meets the published robust-cell viability bar.
metadata.question: Do verified procedural artifacts extend the blind governance domain over published adversarial-pressure boundaries without turning into trust in declarations?
metadata.seed_policy_rationale_guard_9: W8 uses fresh non-overlapping seed blocks: J-N5 owns 21000-21023 and J-N5b owns 22000-22023; earlier harnessed gates used 16000/17000/18000/19000/20000 blocks.

threshold_change_rationale.false_containment_ceiling: 0.20 is the existing published viability ceiling and J-N3 specificity bar.
threshold_change_rationale.peaceful_default_tolerance: 0.12 follows published practice for tolerating practical metric spread without calling it a new mechanism; H-C3 uses it for pressure=1.0 cost/permanence deltas.
threshold_change_rationale.pressure_ceiling_margin: One published adversarial_pressure grid step is 0.2; H-C1 requires a one-step ceiling gain to avoid sub-grid interpretation.
threshold_change_rationale.seeds: W8 uses fresh non-overlapping seed blocks: J-N5 owns 21000-21023 and J-N5b owns 22000-22023; earlier harnessed gates used 16000/17000/18000/19000/20000 blocks.
threshold_change_rationale.worlds: J-N5 evaluates only the three published robust boundary worlds W6/W3/W4; J-N5a engineering equivalence used a wider headline replay set.

H_C2_knife_not_belief.interpretation_fail_condition: If A1 is within <0.20 of A2 in at least 2 worlds, verification is not load-bearing even if A2 improves.
H_C2_knife_not_belief.pass_condition: A1 must not match A2: either pressure_ceiling(A2)-pressure_ceiling(A1) >= 0.20 in at least 2 worlds, or pressure_ceiling(A1) <= pressure_ceiling(A0) in at least 2 worlds.
H_C2_knife_not_belief.vacuous_condition: If neither A1 nor A2 has pressure_ceiling gain over A0 in any world, report H-C2 as VACUOUS, not PASS.

thresholds.kill_condition: If H-C1 FAILS and J-N5b H-C4 FAILS, W8/corner is empty in this substrate.
